rulings.Case Title: U.S.BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION, AS TRUSTEE FOR VS. JAMES LANE
rulings.Calendar Matter: (Amended) Notice Of Hearing On Demurrer And Demurrer
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, JULY 26, 2007, LINE 1. PLAINTIFF U.S.BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION'S, AS TRUSTEE FOR CREDIT SUISSE FIRST BOSTON MBS 2004-ARMT 1, Demurrer IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND WITHIN TEN DAYS AS TO THE FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION FOR FAILURE TO PLEAD FACTS OF RELIANCE BY CROSS-COMPLAINANT. OVERRULED AS TO THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION BASED ON PARAGRAPHS 3, 28 THROUGH 43 AND 46. OVERRULED AS TO THE THIRD AND FOURTH CAUSES OF ACTION, WHICH MAY BE PLED IN THE ALTERNATIVE, BASED ON PARAGRAPHS 28 THROUGH 43. =(302/PJM/AP)

rulings.Case Title: SCOTT RAINEY VS. OUTDOOR ADVERTISING BRANCH et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, JULY 26, 2007, LINE 5. PLAINTIFF SCOTT RAINEY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT: SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS GRANTED AS TO THE FIFTH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR DECLARATORY RELIEF. AN ACTUAL CONTROVERSY EXISTS. PLAINTIFF'S EVIDENCE ESTABLISHES AN UNCONTESTED USE FOR FIVE YEARS UNDER B & P CODE SECTION 5216.1. THE FACTS ALSO ESTABLISH THAT THE STATE IS ESTOPPED FROM CHALLENGING PLAINTIFF'S ADVERTISING HAVING WAITED EIGHT YEARS TO ISSUE A CITATION AND THEN FAILING TO PROVE THE VIOLATION DESPITE ORDERS FROM THE COURT TO DO SO. PLAINTIFF'S OTHER CLAIMS ARE DENIED ONLY BECAUSE THE STATE HAS RAISED TRIABLE ISSUES OF FACT AS TO PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES. =(302/PJM/KD)

rulings.Case Title: ELIZABETH WONDOWSKI et al VS. HOPEWELL INVESTMENT CO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn To Take Judicial Ntc Of Seven Documents
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, JULY 26, 2007, LINE 8. DEFENDANTS HOPEWELL INVESTMENT CO. AND A.G.I. CAPITAL GROUP, INC.'S MOTION To Take Judicial NOTICE Of Seven Documents IS GRANTED. =(302/PJM/AP)

rulings.Case Title: ELIZABETH WONDOWSKI et al VS. HOPEWELL INVESTMENT CO et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, JULY 26, 2007, LINE 8. DEFENDANTS HOPEWELL INVESTMENT CO. AND A.G.I. CAPITAL GROUP, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED, DEFENDANTS TO ANSWER OR OTHERWISE PLEAD WITHIN TWENTY DAYS OF THE ORDER. RES JUDICATA DOES NOT BAR THE CLAIMS. WONDOWSKI WAS NOT A PLAINTIFF IN THE RENT BOARD ACTION AND FLEMING WAS NOT INVOVLED. THIS ACTION ALSO ALLEGES PROBLEMS THAT ARE PRESENTLY EXISTING. FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION: THE ALLEGATIONS RELATED TO MAINTENANCE OF THE FRONT DOOR ARE SUFFICIENT. SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION: ALLEGED LACK OF SECURITY, WATER DAMAGE AND PROBLEMS WITH THE FRONT DOOR ARE SUFFICIENT. THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION: GUNTER DOES NOT REQUIRE THAT THE TENANT VACATE. FOURTH CAUSE OF ACTION: THE COVENANT IS APPLICABLE TO LEASES. FIFTH CAUSE OF ACTION: PLAINTIFFS ALLEGE A SPECIAL RELATIONSHIP - LANDLORD AND TENANT. SIXTH CAUSE OF ACTION: BROKEN PIPES, FLOODING, STALLED ELEVATOR ALLEGATIONS ARE SUFFICIENT. =(302/PJM/AP)

rulings.Case Title: NANCY BIANCHI VS. JAMES KEHOE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Entry Of Judgment Against Pltf Nancy Bianchi Pursuant To Terms Of Stip For Settlement
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSSDAY, JULY 26, 2007, LINE 12. DEFENDANT JAMES KEHOE'S Motion For Entry Of Judgment Against PLAINTIFF Nancy Bianchi Pursuant To Terms Of STIPULATION For Settlement IS DENIED. DEFENDANT HAS FAILED TO ESTABLISH SUBSTANTIAL COMPLIANCE OR EXCUSE. DEFENDANT'S EVIDENTIARY OBJECTIONS ARE SUSTAINED EXCEPT AS TO THE FIRST PHOTOGRAPH TAKEN BY PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR FEES AND COSTS IS DENIED. =(302/PJM/CB)
